OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the stream connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

CONNECTOR_SYNC_INTERVAL.description: Minimum interval between snapshot uploads to Cloudflare. Accepts a duration like '30m', '1h', '1h30m', or a bare number of seconds.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Cloudflare account ID that owns the Rules List.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token with the 'Account > Account Filter Lists > Edit' permission.

CLOUDFLARE_LIST_ID.description: ID of the existing Cloudflare Rules List (IP kind) to sync into.

CLOUDFLARE_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Cloudflare API. Override only for testing against a mock server or a Cloudflare-compatible gateway.
